results.title: Men Who Took Control of Their Lives
results.subtitle: These are real results from men who committed to the 90-day program. Individual results may vary.
results.t1Text: After 3 months on Vigronex, I feel like I'm 30 again. The daily exercises and Dr. Apex made all the difference. My wife noticed the change before I even told her about the program.
results.t2Text: I was skeptical at first. But by week 4, I was waking up with morning erections for the first time in years. The nutrition guide alone was worth it. This program saved my marriage.
results.t3Text: I've tried other programs but none had the science-backed approach of Vigronex. The cold therapy protocol alone made a noticeable difference. I'm more confident in every area of my life now.

beforeAfter.title: The 90-Day Transformation
beforeAfter.subtitle: Real men, real results. These transformations happened through consistent daily practice with the Vigronex program.
beforeAfter.case1Desc: Struggled with performance anxiety for 3 years. After 90 days: confident, energetic, and his relationship is stronger than ever.
beforeAfter.case2Desc: Felt like he had lost his vitality. After 90 days: morning energy restored, performance improved significantly, feels 10 years younger.

guarantee.title: 7-Day Money-Back Guarantee
guarantee.subtitle: We're so confident in Vigronex that we offer a complete, no-questions-asked refund within the first 7 days. If you don't feel a difference, you pay nothing.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: Is Vigronex a substitute for medication like Viagra?
faq.a1: No. Vigronex is a lifestyle program that addresses the root causes of performance challenges — vascular health, pelvic floor strength, hormonal balance, and psychology. It works alongside medication if needed, but many of our users reduce or eliminate their need for medication after completing the program. Always consult your doctor.
faq.q2: How quickly will I see results?
faq.a2: Most men report noticeable improvements within 3–4 weeks, particularly in morning erections and energy levels. Significant performance improvements typically occur by week 6–8. The full 90-day program produces the most lasting results.
faq.q3: Is my information private and secure?
faq.a3: Absolutely. Vigronex uses bank-level encryption. Your health data is never shared with third parties. The app is designed to be completely discreet — no one looking at your phone will know what it is.
faq.a4: No equipment required. All exercises can be done anywhere — at home, in a hotel room, or at the office. The program is designed for busy men who don't have time for a gym.
faq.q5: What if the program doesn't work for me?
faq.a5: We offer a 7-day money-back guarantee, no questions asked. After 7 days, if you've followed the program consistently and haven't seen improvement, contact our support team and we'll work with you personally to adjust your protocol.
faq.q6: Is this suitable for men over 50?
faq.a6: Yes — in fact, men over 50 often see the most dramatic results because they typically have more addressable lifestyle factors. The program adapts to your fitness level and age through the onboarding assessment.

about.title: Built by Doctors and Engineers Who Refused to Accept the Status Quo
about.story: In 2021, Dr. Marcus Chen — a urologist at Stanford Medical Center — noticed a troubling pattern: men in their 30s, 40s, and 50s were coming to him with performance challenges that were entirely preventable. The standard answer was a prescription. But Dr. Chen knew the research: 70% of performance challenges have lifestyle-addressable root causes. He partnered with Dr. Sarah Okonkwo, a clinical psychologist specializing in men's health, and a team of Silicon Valley engineers who had previously built health tracking systems for elite athletes. Together, they spent 18 months developing what would become Vigronex — a program that combines the precision of clinical medicine with the accessibility of modern technology.
about.story2: Today, Vigronex has helped over 12,000 men across 47 countries reclaim their confidence, their relationships, and their vitality. Our team of 5 doctors, 8 engineers, and 3 behavioral scientists continues to refine the program based on real user outcomes. We believe every man deserves access to the same quality of care that was previously only available to elite athletes and wealthy patients.
about.m1Role: Chief Medical Officer · Urologist, Stanford Medical
about.m3Role: CTO · Former Senior Engineer, Google Health
about.teamPhoto: The Vigronex Team — Palo Alto, CA

pwa.bannerDesc: Add to your home screen for quick access and daily notifications
pwa.iosIntro: To add Vigronex to your home screen on iOS:
pwa.iosStep1: Tap the Share button (⬆️) in Safari's bottom bar
pwa.iosStep2: Scroll down and tap "Add to Home Screen"
pwa.iosStep3: Tap "Add" in the top right corner
pwa.iosTip: After installing, Vigronex will open full-screen like a native app and you'll receive daily reminders.

loginSection.title: Already a Member?
loginSection.subtitle: Access your personalized program, track your progress, and continue your journey.

tour.step1Desc: You're about to start a science-backed 90-day program to reclaim your male performance. Let me show you how it works.
tour.step2Desc: Every day, do your performance check-in (0-100). Rate your energy, mood, sleep quality, libido and erection quality. This is the heart of the program.
tour.step3Desc: Complete your daily exercises: Kegel, breathing, cold therapy and cardio. Each exercise has an interactive timer. Consistency is everything.
tour.step4Desc: Talk to Dr. Apex anytime about sexual health, performance and your program. He also sends personalized tips every morning.
tour.step5Desc: Discover scientifically formulated recipes to boost testosterone and improve sexual health. Take photos of your meals for AI calorie analysis.
tour.step6Desc: View your evolution charts, unlocked achievements and weekly reports. Men who track their progress are 3x more likely to complete the program.
tour.step7Desc: Your 90-day program starts TODAY. Do your first check-in, complete today's exercises, and talk to Dr. Apex. Every day counts.
